title: Brazilian Semolina Casserole
description: A unique dessert combining the crunch of semolina with the zesty flavor of chewy elements, inspired by Brazilian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Semolina
ingredients.notes: Fine or coarse, depending on preference

ingredients.name: Brazilian Whipped Cream
ingredients.notes: e.g., heavy cream, sweetened condensed milk, and a pinch of salt

instructions: In a medium bowl, mix semolina and zesty syrup.
In a separate bowl, whip Brazilian whipped cream until stiff peaks form.
In a casserole dish, create a crust with casserole crust mixture.
Add the semolina mixture on top of the crust.
Top with chewy bites and whipped cream.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Serve warm or chilled, garnished with additional chewy bites and zesty syrup if desired.
